title: Audit your codebase
body: Run static analysis tools (ESLint, SonarQube) and generate reports. Check test coverage. Run npm audit for dependency vulnerabilities. List everything in a spreadsheet with severity and estimated effort.
code:
# Generate an ESLint report
npx eslint . --format json --output-file eslint-report.json

# Check test coverage
npx jest --coverage

# Audit dependencies for vulnerabilities
npm audit

# Check for outdated packages
npm outdated
